query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lms_courses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('technical', 'soft_skills', 'compliance', 'leadership', 'onboarding') NOT NULL,
  level ENUM('beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced') NOT NULL,
  duration INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'published', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft',
  created_by INT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lms_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  course_id INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('enrolled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'dropped') DEFAULT 'enrolled',
  progress INT DEFAULT 0,
  enrolled_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  completed_at DATETIME,
  score INT,
  INDEX idx_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_course (course_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outreach_campaigns (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('email', 'social', 'event', 'newsletter', 'webinar') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'scheduled', 'active', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft',
  target_audience VARCHAR(255),
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  budget DECIMAL(15,2),
  reach INT DEFAULT 0,
  engagement INT DEFAULT 0,
  conversions INT DEFAULT 0,
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outreach_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('workshop', 'webinar', 'conference', 'meetup', 'training') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  date DATETIME,
  duration INT,
  location VARCHAR(255),
  is_virtual BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  capacity INT,
  registrations INT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('upcoming', 'ongoing', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'upcoming',
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255),
  joined_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  engagement_score INT DEFAULT 0,
  interests JSON,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'unsubscribed') DEFAULT 'active',
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);
